hazards.location: Upper kitchen cabinets - require reaching above shoulder height
hazards.notes: Frequently used items stored in upper cabinets could lead to falls from reaching
Tile floor can become slippery when wet from cooking/cleaning

hazards.location: Counter area - appliance cords trailing across workspace
hazards.notes: Kettle and toaster cords creating trip hazard
Under-cabinet lighting would improve visibility for food preparation

metadata.notes: Kitchen with typical fall hazard scenarios
